ToolsEmblasoft nScan
Passive Probe

Emblasoft nScan

Emblasoft

Real-time passive monitoring platform providing continuous visibility into live network behaviour from SS7 to 5G SA. Captures every session for deep diagnostics, subscriber tracing and root cause analysis across voice, data and messaging.

How It Works

nScan continuously taps live network traffic across fixed and mobile interfaces — from legacy SS7 through to 5G SA. All sessions are captured and stored using high-performance column-based data storage, enabling fast queries across millions of records. Real-time and on-demand subscriber tracing isolates specific sessions or call flows instantly. Interactive dashboards visualise KPIs, trends and anomalies. Full support for shared RAN environments including MOCN and MORAN. Combined with Evolver, nScan enables operators to reproduce issues detected in live traffic under controlled active conditions.

Functions Served

●F2

Subscriber Experience Segmentation

●F7

●F8

Security Resilience Monitoring

Standalone Use Cases

Law IIIF7solo

Revenue Leakage Identification

Passive probe CDR correlation identifies 3% of data sessions with no corresponding billing record over 30-day audit window.

L1L2L3L4
Unbilled data sessions identified and recovered. Systematic billing gap closed.
Law IVF8solo

Signalling Attack Detection

Passive probe detects anomalous SS7 location request volume — 400% above baseline — originating from a single interconnect partner.

L1L2L3L4
Subscriber location data protected. Regulatory fine for SS7 breach avoided. Interconnect partner liability established.

Combination Use Cases

Law IIF2combination

High-ARPU Pre-Churn Detection

Passive probe identifies subscriber with ARPU >€50 experiencing sustained MOS below 3.5 for 48 hours. No complaint raised.

L1L2L3L4
High-ARPU subscriber retained before entering the churn decision window.
